entities.name: FOXTAIL MILLET

entities.name: NUTRIENT CONTENT
entities.description: The level of nutrients present in the crop

entities.name: DROUGHT RESILIENCE
entities.description: The ability of the crop to withstand drought conditions

entities.name: LOW PHOSPHORUS
entities.description: Phosphorus levels below 5 ppm affecting agricultural soils

entities.description: A region impacted by low phosphorus levels in agricultural soils

entities.name: SOUTHEAST ASIA
entities.description: A region where foxtail millet is extensively grown and impacted by low phosphorus

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH
entities.description: The physical development and growth of the foxtail millet plant

entities.name: YIELD-RELATED TRAITS
entities.description: Agronomical traits that influence the final yield of the crop

entities.name: HEDLEY FRACTIONATION METHOD
entities.description: A method used to determine phosphorus availability in soil

entities.name: HIGH-THROUGHPUT PLATFORMS
entities.description: Phenotyping platforms used to analyze plant growth and traits

entities.name: GENOTYPES
entities.description: Selected genetic variations from the ICRISAT Genebank core collection

entities.name: ICRISAT GENEBANK
entities.description: The repository from which the core collection of genotypes was sourced

entities.name: TILLER COUNT
entities.description: The number of tillers produced by the plant

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of grain produced per plant or area

entities.name: 3D-LEAF AREA
entities.description: The three-dimensional measurement of the leaf surface area

entities.name: ROOT SURFACE AREA
entities.description: The total surface area of the plant's root system

entities.name: GENETIC YIELD POTENTIAL
entities.description: The inherent vigor of a genotype under high-phosphorus conditions

entities.name: TOTAL P CONCENTRATION
entities.description: The total amount of phosphorus concentrated within the plant tissue

entities.name: P USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency with which a plant utilizes available phosphorus

entities.name: TOTAL BIOMASS
entities.description: The total organic mass of the plant

entities.name: P DILUTION
entities.description: The phenomenon where phosphorus concentration decreases as biomass increases

entities.name: P MANAGEMENT STRATEGIES
entities.description: Strategies aimed at optimizing phosphorus availability for crops
